🔄Syncrofeed
FeaturesSelf-hostedGitHub

Read your feeds.
Smarter.

A modern, self-hosted RSS reader with AI summaries, Fever API compatibility, and a clean reading experience.

Get startedSelf-hosted · Free · Open source

Everything you need

📡

All the feeds

RSS 2.0, Atom, JSON Feed. Import via OPML or add URLs one by one.

🧠

AI summaries

Optional LLM-powered summaries. Get the gist without reading everything.

📱

Mobile sync

Fever API compatible. Use your favorite mobile reader app.

📰

Daily digest

A curated summary of your top articles, ready every morning.

🏷️

Smart tags

Auto-categorize and filter articles with intelligent tagging.

🎨

Beautiful reader

Clean, distraction-free reading. Dark mode included.

Self-hosted by design

Docker-ready. SQLite under the hood. No cloud dependency. Your feeds, your data, your server.

# Run with Docker

docker pull ghcr.io/vellis59/syncrofeed:latest

docker compose up -d
